Notes: No. 2 Rensselaer advances to the finals of the ECAC Upstate Championship and
will play host Fisher at 1 p.m. Sunday. Kaczynski sets RPI rec. for career
scoring w/ 1422 pts. Oneonta cut the RPI lead to four at 40-36 with 13:38 left
but RPI went on a 17-0 run over the next 6:30 to pull away.
Game.Officials: Rob DiGaicomo,  Joe DeSain,  Carlo Lorenzetti
